subject: Re: Fwd: Bell 430 S/N 49041 Initial Offer
body:
ok

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> ---------- Forwarded message ----------
> From: HRedeye@aol.com <HRedeye@aol.com>
> Date: Oct 22, 2005 10:54 AM
> Subject: Bell 430 S/N 49041 Initial Offer
> To: LVJET@aol.com
> Cc: bristolgv@earthlink.net, cecilia.steen@gmail.com
> 
> Larry,
>  Per our conversation this morning, I think we
> should have an offer in Rite
> Aid's hands as the #2 position (alternate). We
> should have it to them first
> thing Monday Morning (Oct 24th).
>  The attached offer for review is basically the same
> offer used on the Bell
> 407.
>  In the cover letter, Darren should make it clear
> that you intend to execute
> this offer if the other deal falls apart.
>  Rite Aid Corporation: Tim McAdams
>  Aviation Department Manager
>  RITE AID CORPORATION
>  603 Airport Road
>  Middletown, PA 17057
>  PH: 717-975-5749 - Cell: 717-580-4801
>  FX: 717-944-4155
>  E-mail: tmcadams@riteaid.com
>  I do find it a little strange that they would take
> the first offer, below
> ask, so early in the process. Usually you start
> seriously considering offers
> like this after 30 days.
>  Also, spoke to Jim Sturm - General Helicopters, if
> he had any leads on a
> clean Bell 430, with a retractable gear, single
> pilot IFR. He said he may
> have a lead on one - he would know early next week.
> (Suspect he is the guy
> Rite Aid is dealing with - we should know early next
> week.)
>  Sam
> Hugh Redditt, Jr.
> HUGH REDDITT COMPANY
> PH: 610-383-9320
>

body_html:
ok

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: HRedeye@aol.com HRedeye@aol.com
Date: Oct 22, 2005 10:54 AM
Subject: Bell 430 S/N 49041 Initial Offer
To: LVJET@aol.com
Cc: bristolgv@earthlink.net, cecilia.steen@gmail.com

Larry,
Per our conversation this morning, I think we
should have an offer in Rite
Aid's hands as the #2 position (alternate). We
should have it to them first
thing Monday Morning (Oct 24th).
The attached offer for review is basically the same
offer used on the Bell
407.
In the cover letter, Darren should make it clear
that you intend to execute
this offer if the other deal falls apart.
Rite Aid Corporation: Tim McAdams
Aviation Department Manager
RITE AID CORPORATION
603 Airport Road
Middletown, PA 17057
PH: 717-975-5749 - Cell: 717-580-4801
FX: 717-944-4155
E-mail: tmcadams@riteaid.com
I do find it a little strange that they would take
the first offer, below
ask, so early in the process. Usually you start
seriously considering offers
like this after 30 days.
Also, spoke to Jim Sturm - General Helicopters, if
he had any leads on a
clean Bell 430, with a retractable gear, single
pilot IFR. He said he may
have a lead on one - he would know early next week.
(Suspect he is the guy
Rite Aid is dealing with - we should know early next
week.)
Sam
Hugh Redditt, Jr.
HUGH REDDITT COMPANY
PH: 610-383-9320
